steps.title: Fastest path: mark the figure first
steps.content: Mark the given angle relationships on the figure first: equal angles, vertical angles, supplementary angles, parallel-line angles, and triangle sums of $180^\circ$. Most of these questions become a short angle chase once the givens are marked.

steps.title: Set up the perimeter
steps.content: Let $x$ be the length of the third side. The two congruent sides are each $21$ feet, and the total perimeter is $72$ feet: $$21+21+x=72$$

steps.title: Solve for the third side
steps.content: The two congruent sides have total length $42$ feet, so $$x=72-42=30$$

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: The third side is $30$ feet, so C is correct.
